title: A Russian Spy, Suddenly Cast Into the Spotlight, Flees Japan
summary_full: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.
summary_public: The military intelligence officer left the country after The Times reported that he was using the Aeroflot airline office in Tokyo to conduct espionage.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: A Russian Spy... using the Aeroflot airline office... to conduct espionage
